prompt_text: A man dressed as Jesus, with long brown hair, a beard, an off-white tunic, a brown stole, and sandals, stands beside a silver car on a paved road. He holds a wine glass filled with red liquid. The road runs along the edge of a large, dark lake, with a dense forest of evergreen trees and rolling hills in the background. The sky is overcast and grey, creating diffused natural lighting. The ground near the car is reddish-brown with pine needles. Overlaid on the video are a timestamp, 'BODYCAM MORALES', and 'Sora' logos. The scene transitions to the man walking on the surface of the lake.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A man dressed as Jesus, with long brown hair, a beard, an off-white tunic, a brown stole, and sandals, stands beside a silver car on a paved road. He holds a wine glass filled with red liquid. The road runs along the edge of a large, dark lake, with a dense forest of evergreen trees and rolling hills in the background. The sky is overcast and grey, creating diffused natural lighting. The ground near the car is reddish-brown with pine needles. Overlaid on the video are a timestamp, 'BODYCAM MORALES', and 'Sora' logos. The scene transitions to the man walking on the surface of the lake.

cinematography.mood: Surreal, comedic, and slightly dramatic with an undertone of tension.
cinematography.cameraShot: Starts as a medium shot, transitioning to a wide-angle, first-person bodycam perspective. The camera is slightly shaky, following the actions and eventually submerging partially in water.

actions: A man dressed as Jesus stands holding a wine glass near a silver car.
The man places the wine glass inside the car.
The man walks towards the edge of the lake.
The man steps onto the surface of the water.
The man walks across the lake, moving away from the camera.
A gloved hand (presumably the camera operator's) briefly appears in the frame, seemingly reaching out.
The man continues walking further out onto the water.
dialogue: Camera operator says: "Go ahead and walk a straight line for me, sir."
Man says: "It's just water, I swear."
Camera operator shouts: "Sir! Sir! Stop! Stop! Damn it!"
Ambient sounds: Gentle lapping of water, wind.
